meta.vision: World-dominating, vibe-coded SEO plan for a Codex-built Astro site

topKeywords.notes: Primary H1 + schema anchor for Nepal audience; embed bilingual CTA and map snippet.
Mirror phrasing in hero lead and FAQ microcopy to capture conversational variants.
Add cultural cues, testimonials from Nepali clients, and structured data with areaServed Nepal.
Long-form educational guide with course highlights, itinerary, and embedded short-form video.
Module overview, certification details, and downloadable syllabus gated by email.
Include retreat calendar, partner venues, and schema.org/Event markup.
Dedicated in-person Reiki sales page with LocalBusiness schema and WhatsApp CTAs.
Highlight practitioner credentials, reviews, and AI Overview-ready Q&A block.
Add entity signals: studio address, coordinates, and knowledge panel-ready copy.
900-word experience breakdown, audio teaser, and Service schema with areaServed US/UK/AU.
Add short-form video embed plus Perspectives-optimized transcript highlights.
Clarify booking flow, integration follow-up, and remote session tech requirements.
Structured FAQ with micro-conversions, highlight researcher-backed benefits.
Add AI Overview-ready bullet answers about sensations, timing, and integration tips.
Create chakra-specific microcopy with schema FAQ entries per chakra.
Include ritual checklist, mail-out kit upsell, and WhatsApp CTA.
Add trust badge module and condensed AI Overviews answer snippet.
Embed session replay snippet and reviewers describing outcomes.
Outline tiered mentorship pathways and integration resources.
Add progress roadmap, session cadence, and social proof targeting empaths.
SGE-ready article with protocols, practitioner quotes, and downloadable checklist.
Thought-leadership piece linking to mentorship and corporate offers.
Include empathy burnout quiz and email capture.
Answer People Also Ask clusters, cite studies, add FAQ schema.
Bedtime ritual lead magnet plus internal links to reiki services.
Corporate-focused section with package tiers and PDF download.
Add success metrics, facilitator roster, and inquiry form.
Stick CTA button and structured data for CallAction.
Elevate E-E-A-T: credentials, media appearances, and timeline.
Feature signature offers, entity schema, and clarifying hero copy.

strategyPhases.name: Phase 0 — Vibe Calibration
objectives: Lock in analytics, schema baseline, and AI overview readiness signals.
Capture current rankings, crawl status, and user flows.
tasks: Run full technical audit (Lighthouse + PageSpeed + Astro check) and document in docs/seo/audit-logs/
Install/verify Plausible or GA4, configure WhatsApp click events, and note IDs in FOUNDATION-EXECUTION-CHECKLIST.md
Use Perplexity research outputs to brief humans/Claude on prioritized SERP intent narratives
Archive screenshot + HTML capture of key SERPs in docs/research/serp-snapshots/

strategyPhases.name: Phase 1 — Architecture Glow-Up
objectives: Ship high-intent service routes with AI Overview-ready layouts.
Implement structured data foundation for local + virtual experiences.
tasks: Author /services/reiki-kathmandu, /sound-healing-nepal/learn, /testimonials with modular components and bilingual toggles
Wire JSON-LD generators in src/lib/schema for LocalBusiness, Service, Event, FAQPage, and Review bundles
Refine /virtual-sound-healing layout with multimedia embeds, sticky CTAs, and conversational FAQs
Create programmatic internal linking component (RelatedFrequencyLinks) to bind services ↔ blogs ↔ testimonials

strategyPhases.name: Phase 2 — Magnetic Content Current
objectives: Publish educational pillars targeting emotional + corporate search intent.
Launch short-form video/audio assets to feed Perspectives and AI surfaces.
tasks: Ship five priority blog pillars (keywords 21-25) with long-form depth, pull quotes, and lead magnets
Produce 30-60 second reels stored in public/media/ with captions + VideoObject schema
Spin up resource hub block on /services featuring latest pillars and testimonial snippets
Enable newsletter funnel tagging empath/founder/corporate segments via form integrations

strategyPhases.name: Phase 3 — Authority Amplification
objectives: Reinforce entity authority with reviews, backlinks, and partner co-marketing.
Iterate on conversion flows using analytics + qualitative feedback.
tasks: Deploy review capture automation (WhatsApp/email) referencing key terms, publish fresh testimonials weekly
Secure 12+ contextual backlinks (Nepali wellness directories, retreats, podcasts) and log in docs/authority/outreach-tracker.md
Run quarterly title/meta CTR tests, documenting hypotheses + results in docs/seo/experiments.md
Refresh Perplexity research quarterly, diff keyword shifts, and adjust content roadmap accordingly

strategyPhases.name: Phase 4 — Evergreen Resonance
objectives: Maintain SERP dominance with refresh cycles and AI-era experimentation.
Keep the vibe-coded loop tight between humans, Codex, and Claude.
tasks: Review top SERPs for AI Overview inclusion, update answer blocks + schema where missing
Rotate seasonal offerings (e.g., solstice retreats) into /sound-healing-nepal/learn and sitemap
Summon Codex to regenerate audio/visual assets when engagement dips below target thresholds
Log every prompt chain + outcome inside AGENTS.md to fuel future vibe-coded sessions

codexPrompts.label: Service Page Glow-Up
codexPrompts.prompt: Codex, channel Christina’s sanctuary energy into a 900-word `/services/reiki-kathmandu` page. We need bilingual headers, LocalBusiness schema hook, WhatsApp CTAs, and AI Overview-friendly FAQs. Reflect the sonic palette while keeping copy actionable. Return Astro + Markdown updates.

codexPrompts.label: Programmatic Link Web
codexPrompts.prompt: Codex, craft a reusable Astro component `RelatedFrequencyLinks` that stitches services ↔ blog pillars using intent tags. Lean on existing content collections, expose props for `currentSlug`, and output structured data for breadcrumbs.

codexPrompts.label: Short-Form Video Embed
codexPrompts.prompt: Codex, embed a short-form video showcase on `/virtual-sound-healing`. Use a lightweight player (no heavy iframes), include transcripts for accessibility, and annotate with `VideoObject` schema. Keep design aligned with glassmorphism tokens.

agentPrompts.claudeSpecPrompt: Claude, draft a technical spec for Codex covering component architecture, schema payloads, and acceptance criteria for the new `/sound-healing-nepal/learn` pillar page. Include data mapping for course modules, retreat schedule, and lead magnet capture.
agentPrompts.humanCue: Humans cue the vibe-coded loop by selecting priority tasks, pasting Perplexity insights, and approving Codex deployments inside Cursor. Always document prompt → response chains in PR notes.

instructions.codingStyle: Two-space indentation, trailing commas, glass aesthetic intact. All content authored by Codex in Cursor; humans review, Claude spec-checks.
instructions.schemaGuidelines: Emit JSON-LD via src/lib/schema helpers. Validate with Google Rich Results before merging.
instructions.mediaPolicy: Store hero and reel assets under public/media or src/assets with descriptive filenames. Compress before commit.
instructions.translationRhythm: Prepare Nepali language variants in parallel markdown blocks; hold hreflang rollout until translations approved.
instructions.testingLoop: Before every PR, run `npm run check`, `npm run build`, document QA in SMOKE-TEST-CHECKLIST.md with timestamped notes.

progressChecklist: Log Perplexity research artifact path in docs/research/README.md with date + query.
After each major change, run `npm run check && npm run build`; attach logs to PR description.
Update docs/seo/experiments.md with hypotheses, metrics, and outcomes for CRO/CTR tests.
Record manual QA steps in SMOKE-TEST-CHECKLIST.md and mark completed scenarios.
Sync AGENTS.md with prompt/response chain summaries before closing the session.
Commit using conventional messages (e.g., `feat: launch reiki kathmandu page`), tag related docs updates, and note remaining TODOs.

perplexityCitations: Simplified SEO Consulting — Holistic search behavior 2025
Heallist — Local SEO for holistic practices
